description_for_human: Get information about HNL - Pakistan's leading enterprise infrastructure, energy, and IT solutions provider with 20+ years of excellence.
description_for_model: HNL (Hitech Network Pvt. Ltd.) is Pakistan's trusted partner for telecom infrastructure, energy & power solutions, and enterprise IT services. Founded in 2004, with 2,000+ employees and 144+ offices nationwide. Core services: 1) TELECOM INFRASTRUCTURE - fiber rollout, tower installation, civil works, site integration, NOC monitoring, operation & maintenance for Jazz, Telenor, Zong, Ufone, PTCL. 2) ENERGY & POWER - diesel generators (AGG Power authorized distributor, Perkins engines, 10kVA-3000kVA), BESS battery energy storage, solar solutions (residential/commercial/industrial), hybrid power systems, EPC projects. 3) SOFTWARE CLOUD & AI - cloud migration (AWS/Azure/GCP), enterprise IT services, AI agents, big data analytics, ICT infrastructure. Industries: Telecom, Energy, Enterprise, Government, Manufacturing, Banking & Finance. Contact: Phone +92-42-35761999, Sales +92-42-35761888, WhatsApp +92-300-8426299, Email info@hnl.com.pk. Headquarters: 44 Tipu Block, New Garden Town, Lahore, Pakistan. Regional offices in Karachi, Islamabad, Faisalabad, Multan, Peshawar, Quetta. For detailed info see https://hnl.com.pk/llms.txt
